title: PGN Products Quantitative Uncertainty
author: Martin Tiefengraber
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is the final report of WP2126 “PGN Products Quantitative Uncertainty” of the ESA project “Quality Assurance for Earth Observation” (QA4EO). In this report, the algorithm error of a total column NO2 retrieval is discussed as well as the common error for a particular reference spectrum. Further, the uncertainty propagation within the Blick Software Suite is outlined.
steps_raw: This is the final report of WP2126 “PGN Products Quantitative Uncertainty” of the ESA project “Quality Assurance for Earth Observation” (QA4EO). In this report, the algorithm error of a total column NO2 retrieval is discussed as well as the common error for a particular reference spectrum. Further, the uncertainty propagation within the Blick Software Suite is outlined.
